nasb.text: But if her father should forbid her on the day he hears of it, none of her vows or her obligations by which she has bound herself shall stand; and the Lord will forgive her because her father had forbidden her.

esv.text: But if her father opposes her on the day that he hears of it, no vow of hers, no pledge by which she has bound herself shall stand. And the Lord will forgive her, because her father opposed her.

cnv.text: 但是她父親聽見的時候，如果阻止她，她所許的願和所說約束自己的話，就都為無效；耶和華也必赦免她，因為她父親阻止她。

ccb.text: 倘若她父亲得知后加以反对，她的诺言就无效。耶和华必不追究她，因为她父亲反对。
